phases.title: Auto-increment release version in ReleaseDialog
phases.content: 1. In ReleasesSection.tsx, compute the next patch version from the mergedReleases list and pass it to ReleaseDialog as a suggestedVersion prop. 2. In ReleaseDialog.tsx, accept the suggestedVersion prop and use it as the default version when creating a new release (not editing). 3. Add a getNextVersion utility that properly parses semver, finds the highest version, and increments the patch number.
verification: When opening the release dialog to create a new release, the version field is pre-filled with the next patch version
When editing an existing release, the version field still shows the existing version
If no releases exist, a default like v0.1.0 is shown
